description: Creation-pricing-lock (D-GH31) fixture: cumulative spend crosses DATA.level1AP mid-LOG via a filler purchase, between two different non-pack own-race Halfling trait purchases. Asserts PER-PURCHASE tagging, not a whole-build flag: 'Halfling: Brave' (bought before the crossing) prices at the flat creation rate (origin=2); 'Halfling: Naturally Stealthy' (bought after) prices at the tier-2 locked rate (MASTER[2][band2]=7), in the SAME build.

events.label: Spend filler crossing the creation-pricing threshold
